apiKeys.description: Set up your own API key to enable inbox classification and AI auto-tagging. It is stored encrypted and only your Cloud Functions use it.
apiKeys.getKeyLink: Get your API key at console.anthropic.com
apiKeys.help: Enables inbox classification and AI note auto-tagging.
apiKeys.title: AI providers

appearance.description: Choose the color mode. Auto follows your system preference.
appearance.title: Appearance

language.description: Choose the interface language. AI-generated text follows this preference.
language.title: Language

sidebar.description: Choose whether the sidebar shows or hides to maximize space. Applies to large screens only.

hidden.description: Maximizes space. Use Cmd/Ctrl+B or Cmd/Ctrl+K to navigate.
hidden.label: Hidden

sidebar.title: Sidebar visibility

visible.description: The sidebar shows on large screens.
visible.label: Visible

days15.description: A balance between time and space.
days15.label: 15 days

days30.description: Keeps notes for as long as possible.
days30.label: 30 days

trash.description: Time in the trash before permanent deletion. Cleanup runs once a day.

never.description: Deleted notes are never removed automatically.
never.label: Never

trash.title: Notes trash
